ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-05-2011 IN 220, PLAINTIFFS COLLEEN CANAGA AND THOMAS CANAGA'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE / PREFERENTIAL SETTING IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT ON ITS OWN MOTION SET A TRIAL DATE ON 9/19/11 AT 11:15 AM IN DEPT. 220. DISCOVERY REMAINS OPEN UNTIL THE DAY OF TRIAL. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. THE LAST DAY TO HEAR MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS 9/8/11 WITH 15 DAYS NOTICE. A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET ON 9/9/11 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 603. PLAINTIFF IS TO PROVIDE DEMANDS TO ALL DEFENDANTS BY 9/1/11. A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET ON 6/1/11 AT 2:30 PM FOR STATUS OF TRIAL PREPARATION AND PLAINTIFF'S HEALTH. PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER AND BERRY & BERRY IS TO APPROVE IT AS TO FORM. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
